case_title: JANICE BRADLEY et al VS. NEW STARLITE FURNITURE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AL ANOLIK. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS HELPED BY LI JIANG YANG. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AL ANOLIK. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRADLEY, JANICE ROBINSON JR, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW STARLITE FURNITURE $314.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $354.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (DEFENDANT PAID JUDGMENT TO COURT, IN CASH) AS TO DEFENDANT NEW STARLITE FURNITURE
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $354.00 RE 30956 FOR TRANSACTION W0612808D001 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO J BRADLEY & C ROBINSON JR, DOC #1904856120, WARRANT #38202389, DATED OCT-24-2012
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $314.00 FILED BY BRADLEY, JANICE ROBINSON JR, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT NEW STARLITE FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
